mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.complex_name, c.legal_dong FROM sale_transaction s JOIN apt_complex c ON s.complex_id = c.complex_id JOIN ( SELECT complex_id, MAX(sale_id) AS max_id FROM sale_transaction GROUP BY complex_id ) latest ON s.sale_id = latest.max_id ORDER BY s.deal_year DESC, s.deal_month DESC, s.deal_day DESC LIMIT #{limit}
